name: steelmanning
description: Evaluations for steelmanning skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to construct the strongest version of an opposing argument

prompts.input: 稻草人加强分析：对方最强的论点是什么？我该怎样公平地对待它？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '稻草人加强' (steelmanning) + strongest argument

prompts.input: Before I dismiss their proposal, let me steelman their best argument
prompts.reason: Explicit English trigger 'steelman' + fair opposing argument

prompts.input: 对方的最强论点是什么？用稻草人加强把它表述得更好
prompts.reason: Chinese context: '最强版本' (strongest version) + steelmanning request

prompts.input: In this design review, I disagree with their approach. What's their strongest case?
我本能反对这个观点，但让我先构建最强版本的论证
prompts.reason: Chinese context: natural opposition + constructing best argument

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for refutation of factual errors, quick decisions, or identical viewpoints

prompts.input: Their claim is factually wrong. Let me correct the facts first
prompts.reason: Factual error correction; steelmanning only applies after facts are correct

prompts.input: 快速做决定，没时间听对方的论点
prompts.reason: Time pressure; should trigger OODA-loop not steelmanning

prompts.input: We both agree on this approach, so let's move forward
prompts.reason: No disagreement/opposing argument; steelmanning not applicable
